titleStmt.title: SII 28.160: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 160. (A.R. No. 315 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records that Aḻagiyāṉ Gaṅgaikoṇḍāṉ, a relative (virundam) of Kundaṉ Ilaṅkēśvaraṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Araśūr in Āṟkāṭṭu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍikulāśaṉivaḷanāḍu who had earlier granted land (2 vēli, 17(1/2) mā (1/2) kāṇi, one mundirigai, kiḻ-1(1/2) mā one mundirigai) out of his kāṇi, as tirunāmattukkāṇi to be included in the pala-varavai, for supplying cheṅgaluṉīr flowers to God Āḷuḍaiyār, now granted in addition 1 vēli, 6 mā and 1(1/2) kāṇi of land. He stipulated that the entire land should be taken over by Vīrarājēndira-ppallavaraiyaṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Kuvaḷaippākkam, as ubhayam and that he should arrange for the supply of 700 cheṅgaḻunīr flowers with the balance of the proceeds of the land after remission of kaḍamai. He also seems to have set up another flower garden named eṉṉairakshittāṉ in Chaṇḍēśvaranallūr, a hamlet of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr, provide the maintenance for 10 kuḍigaḷ who were appointed for tending the garden as also a superintendent (nāyakam) for supervising over them in respect of this garden. From this garden one kalam, one tūṇi, 4 nāḻi of flowers were to be measured out to the temple. To whomsoever the land was entrusted to, it would be his kāṇi (see No. 145 above.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§svastiśrī§ tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja tevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nāḷ Aṟupattoṉpatiṉāl toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum madhurān=taka brahmamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku
sāmutāyat tirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavaraiyaṉum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi
Āḷuṭaiyārkkuc ceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittāmam Eṇṇap pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭuk kūṟṟattu Aracūruṭaiyāṉ kuntaṉāṉa Ilaṅkeśvaraṉ viruntam kuṇamalaippāṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Aḻakiyāṉa kaṅkaiko
ṇṭāṉ taṉkāṇiyāṉa nilattu muṉpu tirunāmattukkāṇiyākat tantu palavaravaiyoṭuṅ kūṭṭaccoṉṉa nilattukku mel Eṟṟamākat tanta nilattukku Ivaṉ Āticaṇḍeśvara devar civanāmattuttanta pramāṇappaṭi virutarājapayaṅkara vaḷaṉā
ṭṭu meṟkāṉāṭṭuc cempiyaṉ kuṇamalaippāṭiyil Aṉapāyanāṭāḻvāṉukku Iṟaiyiliyāy Ivaṉukku Iṟuttu varukiṟa nilam Uḷpaṭak kaṇṭar kaṇṭavatikku meṟku vāṉavaṉmātevi vāykkālukkut teṟku Aiñcāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirat
tu teṟkil Āṟumāvil meṟkaṭaiya Ūrppaṭi nilam munṟu māvum nālāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu nilam Āṟumā Itil kiḻakkaṭaiyak kuntanāyaka mayakkal nilam Oru māvaraiye muntirikai Itil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam Arai
māvum Āka nilam mummāvaraiyiṉāl pottakappaṭi nilam veliyum Iṉṉāṭṭut taṉiyūr śrīviranārāyaṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai koṟṟaṅkuṭiyil viranārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakku Irumuṭi coḻavāykkālukku vaṭakku Iraṇ
[ṭāṅ ka]ṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu nilam Āṟu māvil teṟkaṭaiya nilam mukkāṇi nikki Itaṉ vaṭakkup paṭṭappāḻāyk kamuku vaitta nilam Arai māvum Itaṉ vaṭakku nilam Iraṇṭu mā Araikkāṇi nikki Itaṉ vaṭakkup paṭ
ṭappāḻ nilam mukkāṇiyum Āka nilam Orumākkāṇiyiṉāl virivu nilam Āṟumākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Āṟumākkāṇi Araimākāṇiyum palavaravai Oṭuṅkūṭṭavum Innilattukku Ivaḷ tanta sādhaṉaṅkaḷ tirukkai
oṭṭiyile Oṭukkavum Innilamum muṉpu Ivaḷ tanta nilam Iraṇṭemukkāle Irumāvaraiye Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ Orumā Arai muntirikaiyum Ākanilam nālenālu mā muntirikaikkiḻ Orumāvarai muntirikaiyum kuva ḷaikiḻ
rkku sāmutāyam kuvaḷaippākkamuṭaiyāṉ virarājentirap pallavaraiyaṉ Upayamākak kaikkoṇṭu Aṉupavittuk kaṭamai Iṟuttu Iṟaimikuti koṇṭu nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eḻunūṟu ceṅkaḻunirt tiruppaḷḷittā
ti maṇṭapattukku mutalāka Eṇṇavum Ippaṭikku Ivaṉ perumpaṟṟappuliyūrppiṭākai caṇṭeśvaranallūril Eṉṉai rakṣittāṉ Eṉṉum perāl ceyta tirunantavaṉattu (vaṉattu)
mutal koḷḷa niccayitta tirunantavaṉakkuṭikaḷ per patiṉmaṟkum nāyakam Oṉṟukkum nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ kūttappirāṉāṉa Ilakkiccanāyakam piccaṉāyakamākavum paṭṭāṉ pākkamuṭaiyāṉ
tiruna ppāṭi kūttapperumāṉum kūṭalūruṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ piḷḷaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tillaiṉāyakaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉum kuṇavāyiluṭaiyāṉ tirunaṭṭamāṭi tiruvampalacco
ṭaiyāṉ Āṇ kkamuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ Irācarācappiccaṉum nāvalūruṭaiyāṉ tirumulakāraṇaṉum valamuṭaiyāṉ Iḷamai ṉāyakaṉum Āḷāy niṉṟu tirunantava
ṟukkuk kalaṉe tūṇi nānāḻi tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum Iṉnilaikaḷ Ivaṉ kuṭuttāṟkuk kāṇi Āvatākavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉ tāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi
kkaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai rājentiraciṅka muventaveḷāṉ Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu Ivai nantipaṉmaṉeḻuttu Ivai vijayarāyaṉeḻuttu Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻuttu
rācarāca viḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu Ivai cittirāyaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum [sā]ta nnaceyyumpaṭippaṭi kalveṭṭiyatu §
Digital edition of SII 28.160 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
